lighting.shadow_character: 부드러운 그림자, 필 라이트로 채워져 디테일이 살아있음

color.grading_style: 매트 필름 룩 (Matte Film Look) with lifted blacks

texture.detail_rendering: 나무, 도자기, 음식의 질감이 부드러운 조명 아래 잘 표현됨

improvement_notes: 입체감을 위한 키커 라이트(Kicker Light) 추가, 음식의 신선함을 강조하기 위한 강조색(계란, 쪽파)의 채도/명도 선택적 상향 조정, 그리고 사진에 생동감을 더하기 위한 젓가락이나 손과 같은 스토리텔링 요소 추가를 제안합니다.
nano_banana_prompt: A top-down flat lay, professional food photography of [Your Food Here], neatly arranged on a dark rustic wooden board with textured ceramic side dishes. The scene is illuminated by a large, diffused soft light from the top-left, creating gentle, soft shadows. Moody and atmospheric tone, with a desaturated and muted color palette, emphasizing rich brown and neutral tones. A vibrant accent color from the main ingredient pops against the calm background. The image has an analog film aesthetic, similar to Kodak Portra 400, featuring a matte look with slightly lifted blacks and very fine film grain. Shot on a 50mm lens with a deep depth of field (f/11), hyper-detailed, cinematic.
